name: Ice Rink & Baranof Park
description: Ice Rink & Baranof Park is a place to play pickleball in Kodiak, AK. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: North Star School
description: North Star School is a place to play pickleball in Kodiak, AK. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A membership is required to play.
